executionHistory.summary: Filed consolidated BUG-031-008 (6+1 artifacts: bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json) for the 4 CI-integration-job clusters. Root causes confirmed by code read: C1 = smackerel.sh auth)/connector) exec missing -T (docker compose exec aborts with TTY error in non-interactive caller; cmd_auth.go returns 2 correctly); C3a = stale spec-065 SCOPE-1 canary (the 4 micro-tools now self-register via init()->RegisterTool; spec-076 Scope-3 tool_registry_canary confirms); C3b = weather-query-v1.yaml allowed_tools dropped location_normalize (git 4a883984 spec-061); restore per operator directive. C2 = live-stack readiness, repro-gated (local-vs-CI). Reproduction in flight.

Reproduced all clusters at HEAD 28851e7a via ./smackerel.sh test integration (test core/ml host ports temporarily moved to 30001/30002 to dodge a local VS Code-Server ephemeral-port collision on 45002; repro-only, reverted before staging). Reproduction OVERTURNED two hypotheses: C1 is NOT -T — the containerized go-integration runner has no docker so the auth) arm's require_docker aborts (docker is required, exit 1); fixed by skip-when-no-docker in cli_auth_passthrough_test.go. C2 is NOT cold-start — core was healthy (degraded-200) but CORE_EXTERNAL_URL=127.0.0.1:PORT is unreachable from inside the compose-network runner; fixed by adding the in-network -e CORE_EXTERNAL_URL=http://smackerel-core:8080 override in smackerel.sh (mirrors ML_SIDECAR_URL). C3a refined: only location_normalize+entity_resolve register at import (init); unit_convert+calculator are lazy; canary subtest replaced. C3b confirmed: location_normalize restored to weather allowed_tools. C4 surfaced as SEPARATE (TestLocationNormalizeIntegration fails because the test-stack geocode stub returns Reykjavik for all inputs, F-065-LOCATION-STUB; orphaned superseded spec-065 SCOPE-2 test) -> skip-when-stub (new Scope 5). Post-fix VERIFY re-run: VERIFY_EXIT=0 — C2/C3a/C3b PASS, C1/C4 honest SKIP; tests/integration + /api + /assistant packages all ok. RED+GREEN transcripts in report.md. Files changed: smackerel.sh, tests/integration/cli_auth_passthrough_test.go, tests/integration/assistant/microtools_registry_canary_test.go, tests/integration/assistant/microtools_location_test.go, config/prompt_contracts/weather-query-v1.yaml. spec-083 untouched. Next: revert temp ports, isolate in worktree, push ff to origin/main, watch CI integration job.

Cluster 6 (residual, revealed after the C1-C5 fix merged at 75ee520d): the four tests/integration/openknowledge tests (TestOpenKnowledge_HybridInternalAndWeb, TestAgent_PerUserMonthlyBudgetExceeded, TestAgent_ToolFailureRefusesWithCapture, TestAgent_WebSearchDisabledFallsBack) all FAIL at agent.New with 'Config.SourcesMax must be > 0 (G028 — no silent default; load from assistant.sources_max)'. RED captured verbatim from the CI integration-test-log @ 75ee520d (CI run 27400228490, integration job; the only red job — lint-and-test/cross-language-canary/build all green) and locally corroborated by /tmp/intlog/integration-test.log. Root cause: BUG-064-002 added the required agent.Config.SourcesMax field (agent.go:145) with fail-loud G028 validation (agent.go:215-216) and updated the prod wiring + unit baseCfg but missed the integration helper defaultCfg() (helpers_test.go:114). FIX: one line — add 'SourcesMax: 5' to defaultCfg() (mirrors config/smackerel.yaml:899 assistant.sources_max:5 + unit baseCfg); the G028 validation is correct and was NOT weakened. VALIDATION: full integration suite GREEN this session (PASS: go-integration, INTEGRATION_EXIT=0, all 6 clusters together, no 7th cluster); focused re-run of the 4 openknowledge tests GREEN (ok tests/integration/openknowledge, FOCUSED_EXIT=0) with each test exercising real agent behavior (hybrid retrieval num_sources=2, cap_usd budget refusal, circuit-breaker tool-failure capture, web-search-disabled fallback) — non-tautological (construct-fail RED -> real-behavior PASS). format --check + check clean. Isolation: only tests/integration/openknowledge/helpers_test.go + the BUG-031-008 artifacts changed; spec-083-free. artifact-lint EXIT=0; state-transition-guard EXIT=1 (TRANSITION BLOCKED: 58 packet-wide pre-existing governance failures that equally affect the already-merged C1-C5 scopes — incl. Check 16/G028 DEFAULT_FALLBACK in ml/app/main.py which is spec-083 HARD-untouchable, plus missing policySnapshot/scenario-manifest/lockdownState, 8 specialist phases, regression-E2E planning, DoD-Gherkin fidelity, etc.). Status STAYS in_progress: the technical objective (CI integration job GREEN) is met by the C6 push, but done-certification with guard exit 0 is a GENUINE BLOCKER needing a separate governance-hardening pass over the whole packet + spec-083-owner resolution of the ml/app/main.py finding (not achievable within this surgical residual-cluster fix without violating the spec-083 untouchable constraint or G041 anti-manipulation). Next: commit + push ff to origin/main; confirm CI integration job green on the new SHA.
